title: Japan reports lower-than-expected core inflation for February, headline CPI eases for a fourth month
summary_full: The consumer price index fell to 1.3% last month, its lowest level since March 2022 and below the central bank's 2% target. It was down from 1.5% in January.
summary_public: The consumer price index fell to 1.3% last month, its lowest level since March 2022 and below the central bank's 2% target. It was down from 1.5% in January.
